name: Nametag
scaffolding_intent: Displays a floating label with ellipsis attached to the entity, inviting the child to name it

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Size multiplier for the nametag label

correction_intent: Child used the WRONG TITLE, ROLE, or PROFESSION for a character (e.g. said 'teacher' when it's actually a 'conductor', said 'the boy' when the scene shows 'the fireman', called a 'doctor' a 'nurse'). The entity itself IS present in the scene — the child sees the right person but labels them with the wrong name/role/profession. This is NOT about confusing two different entities (use I1 for that). I2 is specifically about mislabeling a character's identity/role.
suggestion_intent: Child could give a name to an entity to enrich their narrative
